basics.name: Mark L F Tlau
basics.title: Systems Administrator & Network Engineer
basics.bio: Specializing in Linux administration, secure container orchestration, and enterprise network defense. Built to ensure zero downtime, strictly adhere to SLAs, and bypass complex CGNAT restrictions.

expertise.title: Linux Server Administration
expertise.description: Deployment, disaster recovery, and hardware acceleration management (Intel QuickSync) for heavy local workloads.

expertise.title: Network Segmentation & Security
expertise.description: Design of secure VLANs, DNS sinkholing, and automated SSL certificate management via edge proxies.

experience.description: Architecting resilient backend services and managing VPS deployments. Overseeing full project lifecycles including database administration (PostgreSQL/MariaDB), secure containerized deployments, and ongoing server maintenance.

Administered a 35-machine network, serving as the primary L1/L2 technical expert for administrative staff. Handled hardware troubleshooting, network uptime, and engineered VBA automation saving 120+ administrative hours per cycle.

projects.title: Multi-Tenant Homelab Cluster
projects.description: Architected a zero-trust environment bypassing CGNAT using Tailscale mesh networks and Caddy reverse proxies.

projects.title: Linux Environment Automation
projects.description: Engineered a custom Bash scripting suite to fully automate the provisioning of development environments on login. Manages application state, terminal session restoration, and workspace layouts, reducing initialization time by 85%.

education.degree: Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Applications (PGDCA)
